skills.name: gpio-controller
skills.description: Control GPIO pins on Qualcomm embedded boards — read/write digital I/O, configure pull resistors, and set up interrupt handlers.
useCases: Toggle an LED connected to a GPIO pin
Read a button or sensor state
Set up edge-triggered interrupts on a GPIO line
Configure input pull-up or pull-down resistors

skills.name: wifi-manager
skills.description: Manage Wi-Fi connections using wpa_supplicant or NetworkManager — scan for networks, connect with WPA2/WPA3, and monitor link quality.
useCases: Connect to a WPA2 or WPA3 protected network
Scan and list visible access points
Check current link quality and RSSI

skills.name: uart-bridge
skills.description: Set up and communicate over UART serial ports — configure baud rate, parity, and flow control, and send/receive raw bytes or ASCII lines.
useCases: Open a UART port at a specific baud rate
Send and receive ASCII commands over serial
Log serial output to a file
